subject: fix(modules): resolve 10 issues in contract upload feature
body:
Bugs fixed:
- Stale props: ContractUploadPreview ignored new candidates when
  sub-section toggle changed. Added key prop to force remount.
- Duplicate flow infinite loop: "Upload anyway" re-opened file picker
  which re-triggered duplicate detection. Now stores ParseResult in
  duplicate state and proceeds directly to preview.
- Retry progress tracking: retrying failed modules replaced the entire
  progress array with a shorter one, losing successful items. Now merges
  retry results back at the correct indices.
- hardSplitAtWordBoundary title count: used pre-filter chunk count in
  titles like "(2/5)" when only 3 chunks existed. Now filters first.
- handleSplitOversized double computation: called splitOversizedSection
  twice. Now computes once and reuses.

Standards fixes:
- Touch targets: preview move buttons were 36px, below WCAG 2.5.5
  minimum 44px. Matched to existing ModuleCard pattern.
- Duplicated MODULE_CONTENT_LIMIT: exported from contractSplitter,
  imported in ContractUploadPreview instead of redeclaring.
- BATCH_SIZE inside component: moved to module scope as UPLOAD_BATCH_SIZE.
- PDF type annotation: replaced complex conditional type inference with
  simple let + await pattern, letting TypeScript infer the type.
- recordUpload on partial failure: hash was recorded even when some
  modules failed, causing false duplicate warnings on retry. Now only
  records on full success.

Tags: bugfix, quality, accessibility, modules, upload
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: contract-upload
Semver: patch

title: resolve 10 issues in contract upload feature
